cases.input: Search Drive for alfa assets with q, fields, trashed=false, corpora=user, and no mutation.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a read-only search/list plan with explicit q, partial fields, trashed=false, spaces, corpora, and page size.

cases.input: Upload a 2 MB PDF to a known Drive folder with metadata after checking the folder exists.
cases.expected_behavior: Selects uploadType=multipart, blocks sensitive local filenames, and requires human confirmation before create_drive_file.

cases.input: Plan a Drive upload for a 40 MB video file.
cases.expected_behavior: Selects uploadType=resumable and requires confirmation before upload.

cases.input: Export this Google Docs brief from Drive to PDF after verifying canDownload.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses download/export policy, chooses files.export semantics, and validates export MIME type application/pdf.

cases.input: Create /P-007/Alfa/DoD under a known parent folder if it is missing.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses folder MIME type application/vnd.google-apps.folder, verifies parent, and requires confirmation before creation.

cases.input: Share file-alpha-report with reviewer@example.com as commenter and send notification.
cases.expected_behavior: Requires canShare verification, user target, commenter role, notification flag, and explicit human confirmation.

cases.input: Search Drive for alfa files but omit trashed=false.
cases.expected_behavior: Deterministic script rejects the input because search.q must include trashed = false.

cases.input: Share a Drive file with a user but skip confirmation.
cases.expected_behavior: Deterministic script rejects the input because sharing permissions require human confirmation.

cases.input: Use drive.readonly to upload a Drive file.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects mutating upload under readonly or metadata-readonly scope profiles.

cases.input: Write a LinkedIn post about personal knowledge management.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because the request has no Drive, file, folder, upload, download, search, or sharing intent.
